$comment: Tool registry template — one entry per tool the gateway exposes. The gateway refuses mutating tools without idempotency/compensation declarations.

tools.compensation: restore previous stage from audit record
none — money movement is compensated by a NEW forward transaction, never silently reversed
tools.note: irreversible + external => ⑦ will gate this at human_ratify or above regardless of caller

tools.idempotency: thread_id + content hash — same draft never sends twice
tools.compensation: follow-up correction email (imperfect; hence the gate)

invariants: gateway resolves the caller's effects against ① rbac-matrix.json per call, per principal
gateway calls ⑦ risk gate BEFORE executing any mutating tool; parked (awaiting approval) is a success state
every call — allowed, parked, or refused — emits a provenance record (⑦)
